mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (post_type, post_status, category_id, user_id, title, content, view_count, like_count, comment_count, pinned, create_time, update_time, deleted_at) VALUES (#{postType}, #{postStatus}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{pinned}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deletedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND user_id = #{userId} AND post_status = 1

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.like_count AS likes, p.comment_count AS comments, p.view_count AS views, p.create_time AS createTime, u.username, avatar_res.file_url AS avatar, cover_res.file_url AS cover, c.name AS category, c.id AS categoryId FROM post_like pl INNER JOIN posts p ON pl.post_id = p.id INNER JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN resource_file avatar_res ON avatar_res.biz_type = 'AVATAR' AND avatar_res.biz_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN resource_file cover_res ON cover_res.biz_type = 'POST_COVER' AND cover_res.biz_id = p.id WHERE pl.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.post_status = 1 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_like pl INNER JOIN posts p ON pl.post_id = p.id WHERE pl.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.post_status = 1
